fields.helpText: The date the statistics were captured.
This field stores the number of times a bill was manually added to a  Repayment Plan on a given day.
This field stores the number of bills added to Repayment Plans by the  Repayment Plan Nightly Process.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that were flagged for Review on a given day by either the Repayment Plan Nightly Process or when bills were manually added to a Repayment Plan.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that were removed from Review on a given day by either the Repayment Plan Nightly Process or when the terms of the plan were edited.

fields.fieldName: RPP NO. PLANS NEW CS AUTO
fields.helpText: This field stores the number of active Repayment Plans whose debtors had  bills sent to the Treasury Cross Servicing Program with the Repayment  Plans AUTO ADD (automatically adding new bills to active repayment plans)  set to Yes.

fields.fieldName: RPP NO. PLANS NEW CS NO AUTO
fields.helpText: This field stores the number of active Repayment Plans whose debtors had  bills sent to the Treasury Cross Servicing Program with the Repayment  Plans AUTO ADD (automatically adding new bills to active repayment plans)  set to No.
This field stores the number of new Repayment Plans created on a given  date for debtors who have debt referred to the Treasury Cross Servicing Program.
This field stores the number of active plans whose debtors with debt in the Treasury Cross Servicing Program recalled all of that debt  successfully.
This fields stores the Number of Forbearances granted daily.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of New to a status of Current.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Current to a status of Late.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Late to a status of Delinquent.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Delinquent to a status of Defaulted.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Defaulted to a status of Terminated.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Late to a status of Current.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Delinquent to a status of Late.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Delinquent to a status of Current.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Defaulted to a status of Delinquent.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Defaulted to a status of Late.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Defaulted to a status of Current.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Current to a status of Paid In Full.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Late to a status of Paid In Full.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Delinquent to a status of Paid In Full.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Defaulted to a status of Paid in Full.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have been  Closed using the reason of Administrative.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have been  manually Closed due to Debtor Default.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of New to a status of Closed.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Current to a status of Closed.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Late to a status of Closed.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of Delinquent to a status of Closed.
This field stores the number of Repayment Plans that have moved from a  status of NEW to PAID IN FULL.
This field stores the number of new Repayment Plans created.
This field stores how long it took the AT CS review portion of the  Repayment Plan Nightly Process to run (in seconds).
This field stores the length of time (in seconds) it took to complete the Add New Bills section of the Repayment Plan Nightly Process.
This field stores the length of time (in seconds) it took to complete the  Repayment Plan Status Update portion of the Repayment Plan Nightly  Process.
